a_aplica_o_precisa_de_acesso_c_mara_para: The app needs camera access to read codes.
foque_bem_o_datamatrix_e_capture: Focus well on the DataMatrix and capture
use_it_before_you_lose_it: Use it before you lose it
your_inventory_is_empty_add_products_to_: Your inventory is empty! Add products to see recipes that use them before they expire.
no_recipes_match_your_expiring_ingredien: No recipes match your expiring ingredients right now. Check back later!
your_smart_assistant_for_food_inventory_: Your smart assistant for food inventory. Never let food go to waste again.
we_need_a_couple_of_permissions_to_make_: We need a couple of permissions to make the magic happen.
to_scan_barcodes_and_read_expiration_dat: To scan barcodes and read expiration dates instantly.
to_alert_you_before_your_food_expires: To alert you before your food expires.
your_smart_kitchen_is_ready_let_s_start_: Your smart kitchen is ready. Let's start by adding your first items.
select_your_primary_eating_pattern_to_fi: Select your primary eating pattern to filter recipes accurately.
we_will_strictly_exclude_recipes_contain: We will strictly exclude recipes containing these ingredients.
choose_the_primary_language_for_the_app_: Choose the primary language for the app and recipes.
how_would_you_like_the_app_to_call_you: How would you like the app to call you?
automatic_mode_targets_the_highest_movem: Automatic mode targets the highest movement periods during the day.
if_the_app_exceeds_the_defined_limit_old: If the app exceeds the defined limit, older cached files will be automatically deleted.
set_the_maximum_space_the_app_is_allowed: Set the maximum space the app is allowed to use.
how_often_data_is_synced_to_the_cloud: How often data is synced to the cloud.
run_backups_quietly_during_your_lowest_a: Run backups quietly during your lowest activity hours.
allow_the_app_to_run_essential_tasks_whi: Allow the app to run essential tasks while closed. Disabling this saves battery but halts automation.

developed_to_combat_domestic_food_waste_: Developed to combat domestic food waste. © 2026 Rafael Peres.
name: NAME
language_description: Choose how you want to experience Trophi.
android_battery_desc: Android might restrict background activity to save battery. Allow unrestricted access so we can always protect your food.
ios_battery_desc: We'll run quietly in the background to keep your inventory updated.
android_battery_card: Set Trophi to 'Unrestricted' in your battery settings to ensure alerts aren't delayed.
ios_battery_card: Background refresh is handled automatically by iOS.
camera_access_desc: Trophi needs your camera to scan barcodes and expiration dates. Please enable it in your device settings to continue.
notifications_disabled_desc: You won't receive alerts for expiring food. You can enable this later in your device settings.
unrestricted_battery_desc:
To ensure you never miss an expiration alert, please prevent Android from killing the app in the background:

1. Tap 'Battery' or 'App battery usage'
2. Select 'Unrestricted' or 'Allow background activity'
